summary: Successfully tested all 3 improvements: Lucide icons replace emojis in subcategory modals, pricing guidance shows for all services, and 'Popular in your area' section updates correctly based on postcode (tested SW1, M1, L1). All backend APIs and frontend features working perfectly.
passed_tests: Backend API - All 22 endpoints passing (100%)
Backend API - /api/categories returns price_range for all 49 categories
Backend API - /api/categories/popular/SW1 returns 4 region-specific services
Backend API - /api/categories/popular/M1 returns 4 Manchester-specific services
Backend API - /api/categories/popular/L1 returns 4 Liverpool-specific services
Backend API - /api/categories/groups returns 6 category groups
Backend API - /api/categories/group/home-services returns filtered categories
Frontend - Subcategory modals show Lucide icons instead of emojis
Frontend - All subcategories display pricing guidance in green text (£12-20/hr format)
Frontend - 'Popular near you' section appears below search bar
Frontend - Popular services update when postcode entered (SW1 → 'Popular in SW1')
Frontend - SW1 shows: Cleaning, Handyman, Tutoring, Pets
Frontend - M1 shows: Cleaning, Handyman, Moving Help, Delivery Drivers
Frontend - L1 shows: Cleaning, Handyman, Moving Help, Pets
Frontend - Popular services correctly vary by UK region
Frontend - Clicking popular service navigates to browse page with category filter
Frontend - Icons properly colored based on parent category theme
Frontend - Home Services modal: 10 subcategories with Lucide icons and pricing
Frontend - Vehicle Services modal: 9 subcategories with Lucide icons and pricing
Frontend - Personal Services modal: 8 subcategories with Lucide icons and pricing
Frontend - Business Support modal: 7 subcategories with Lucide icons and pricing
Frontend - Digital Services modal: 7 subcategories with Lucide icons and pricing
Frontend - Events & Staffing modal: 8 subcategories with Lucide icons and pricing

success_percentage.backend: 100% (22/22 API endpoints passing, including new category endpoints)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all 3 improvements working: Lucide icons, pricing guidance, region-specific popular services)
